# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.180.0/http/server.ts";
import { validate } from "https://deno.land/x/validator@v0.0.1/mod.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

// Whitelist of allowed filter parameters
const ALLOWED_FILTERS = new Set([
  "name",
  "email",
  "status",
  "role",
  "department"
]);

// Whitelist of allowed sort orders
const ALLOWED_SORTS = new Set(["asc", "desc"]);

// Validate and sanitize input
function validateInput(input: string): boolean {
  if (!input || typeof input !== "string") return false;
  // Prevent injection attacks
  if (input.includes(";") || input.includes("--") || input.includes("/*")) {
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

// Sanitize key parts for KV storage
function sanitizeKeyPart(part: string): string {
  if (!validateInput(part)) {
    throw new Error("Invalid key part");
  }
  return part.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "");
}

// Build dynamic KV key
function buildKey(prefix: string, id: string, filterParam?: string): Array<string | number> {
  const key = [prefix, sanitizeKeyPart(id)];
  if (filterParam && ALLOWED_FILTERS.has(filterParam)) {
    key.push(filterParam);
  }
  return key;
}

// Search function with flexible filters
async function searchUsers(filters: Record<string, string>, sort: string): Promise<any[]> {
  const results: any[] = [];
  const prefix = "users";
  
  // Validate sort parameter
  if (!ALLOWED_SORTS.has(sort)) {
    sort = "asc";
  }
  
  // Build search keys based on filters
  const searchKeys: Array<Array<string | number>> = [];
  
  if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) {
    // No filters - get all users
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix: [prefix] });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2) { // Direct user entries
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  } else {
    // Apply filters
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters)) {
      if (!ALLOWED_FILTERS.has(key)) continue;
      
      if (!validateInput(value)) {
        throw new Error("Invalid filter value");
      }
      
      // Create key for this filter
      const searchKey = buildKey(prefix, value, key);
      searchKeys.push(searchKey);
    }
    
    // Fetch results for each search key
    for (const searchKey of searchKeys) {
      const iter = kv.list({ prefix: searchKey });
      for await (const entry of iter) {
        if (entry.key.length === 3) { // Filtered entries
          results.push(entry.value);
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Sort results
  results.sort((a, b) => {
    if (sort === "asc") {
      return (a.name || "").localeCompare(b.name || "");
    } else {
      return (b.name || "").localeCompare(a.name || "");
    }
  });
  
  return results;
}

// API handler
async function handleRequest(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const path = url.pathname;
    const method = req.method;
    
    // Basic authentication check
    const auth = req.headers.get("authorization");
    if (!auth || !auth.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Unauthorized" }), {
        status: 401,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
    
    const token = auth.substring(7);
    if (token !== Deno.env.get("API_TOKEN")) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid token" }), {
        status: 401,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
    
    if (method === "GET" && path.startsWith("/api/users")) {
      const params = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries());
      
      // Extract filters
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(params)) {
        if (ALLOWED_FILTERS.has(key)) {
          filters[key] = value;
        }
      }
      
      const sort = params.sort || "asc";
      
      const results = await searchUsers(filters, sort);
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(results), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
    
    if (method === "POST" && path === "/api/users") {
      const body = await req.json();
      
      // Validate required fields
      if (!body.id || !body.name) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Missing required fields" }), {
          status: 400,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
        });
      }
      
      // Validate input
      if (!validateInput(body.id) || !validateInput(body.name)) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid input" }), {
          status: 400,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
        });
      }
      
      const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(body.id);
      
      // Store user data
      const userKey = buildKey("users", userId);
      await kv.set(userKey, { ...body, id: userId });
      
      // Store filtered keys for search
      for (const [filterKey, filterValue] of Object.entries(body)) {
        if (ALLOWED_FILTERS.has(filterKey) && typeof filterValue === "string") {
          const filterKeyParts = buildKey("users", filterValue, filterKey);
          await kv.set(filterKeyParts, { ...body, id: userId });
        }
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("API Error:", error);
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Internal server error" }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  }
}

serve(handleRequest, { port: 8000 });
